notes: Real news view counts are usually not public; this version uses open RSS sources and avoids paywalled links.
Add comma-separated RSS URLs to NEWS_FEED_URLS in .env.local to include TLDR-style newsletters or other readable feeds.
AI items must pass freshness and evidence-chain gates; application items need at least two anchors with one primary anchor.
First-read summaries and AI application risk analysis use DeepSeek only, not GPT; traceable source extracts are used when DeepSeek is unavailable.

articles.title: 上海出台服务类社会救助市级标准  变“人找政策”为“政策找人”
articles.highlight: 标准化建设正是上海将制度优势转化为治理效能的核心抓手。
articles.summary: 上海作为全国首批服务类社会救助改革创新试点，首个市级标准体系在曹家渡街道验收通过，将服务类救助从项目探索升级为制度性保障，实现统一服务规范、评估标准和流程闭环。该标准旨在提高救助可及性和公平性，值得关注其在全国范围内的推广效果。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该标准有助于提升社会救助效率，但需关注基层执行中的资源配给和培训落实。
articles.sourceExcerpt: 中新网上海7月21日电(记者 陈静)记者21日获悉，上海是全国首批服务类社会救助改革创新试点地区之一。标准化建设正是上海将制度优势转化为治理效能的核心抓手。政府部门通过统一服务规范、统一评估标准、统一流程闭环，让服务类救助从零散的项目探索，升级为稳定、可及、公平的制度性保障。2026年，历经2年试点，首个贯穿服务类救助全流程、各环节的标准体系在曹家渡街道验收通过，成为《中华人民共和国社会救助法》正式实施后率先诞生的关于服务类救助的市级标准。

zh.title: 上海出台服务类社会救助市级标准 变“人找政策”为“政策找人”
zh.highlight: 标准化建设正是上海将制度优势转化为治理效能的核心抓手。

zh.failureAnalysis: 该标准有助于提升社会救助效率，但需关注基层执行中的资源配给和培训落实。

en.highlight: Standardization is the core lever for Shanghai to transform institutional advantages into governance efficiency.
en.summary: As one of China's first pilot areas for service-based social assistance reform, Shanghai's first municipal standard system was approved in Caojiadu Subdistrict, upgrading service assistance from fragmented projects to stable, accessible, and fair institutional guarantees with unified service norms, evaluation standards, and closed-loop processes. The standard aims to improve the accessibility and equity of assistance, and its nationwide promotion merits attention.
en.failureAnalysis: The standard can enhance aid efficiency, but attention is needed on resource allocation and training implementation at the grassroots level.
en.title: Shanghai Issues Municipal Standards for Service-Based Social Assistance, Shifting from 'People Seeking Policies' to 'Policies Seeking People'

articles.title: Three reasons why UK electricity prices are so high
articles.highlight: 政府宣布将家庭用电增值税降至零，但英国人的电费仍高于许多其他欧洲国家。
articles.summary: 本文分析了英国电价居高不下的三个主要原因，包括能源成本、网络费用和政策影响。政府虽减免增值税，但结构性因素仍使英国电价高于欧盟多数国家，值得关注能源市场改革。
articles.failureAnalysis: 关键要点：电价高企源于多重结构性因素，仅靠减税难以根本解决。了解这些原因有助于理解英国能源政策挑战。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The government has announced it will cut VAT on domestic electricity to zero but Britons still pay more for power than many other European nations.

en.highlight: The government has announced it will cut VAT on domestic electricity to zero but Britons still pay more for power than many other European nations.
en.summary: This article explains three main reasons for high UK electricity prices, including energy costs, network charges, and policy factors. Despite the VAT cut, structural issues keep prices above most EU nations, making it a key read for understanding energy market challenges.
en.failureAnalysis: Key takeaway: high electricity prices stem from multiple structural factors that VAT reduction alone cannot fix. Understanding these reasons sheds light on UK energy policy challenges.
en.title: Three reasons why UK electricity prices are so high

articles.title: ‘There’s no way they can survive’: Trump defends new 50% tariffs on most Canadian goods – US politics live
articles.highlight: “他们绝对无法生存”，特朗普声称，因为马克·卡尼同意“加强谈判”。
articles.summary: 文章报道了特朗普为对加拿大商品征收50%关税的辩护，声称加拿大长期以来对美强硬。与此同时，加拿大总理马克·卡尼同意加强与美国的谈判。此外，美国油价因与伊朗冲突持续上涨。

According to the American Automobile Association (AAA), a gallon of fuel is now just over $4 – almost a dollar more than a year ago. It comes as Brent Crude , the international oil benchmark, is now up by almost 2% to $90.92 a barrel .

en.summary: The article reports Trump's defense of new 50% tariffs on Canadian goods, claiming Canada has been tough on the US. Meanwhile, Canadian PM Mark Carney agrees to intensify negotiations. US gas prices continue to rise due to conflict with Iran.

articles.title: Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: No clear evidence
articles.summary: 文章介绍了Nativ这款macOS桌面应用，它封装了MLX库，提供类似LM Studio的聊天界面和本地API服务器。特别之处在于能自动加载用户Hugging Face缓存中的模型，省去重复下载的麻烦。对于Mac用户来说，这是一个方便、低门槛的本地AI模型运行工具。
articles.failureAnalysis: 目前仅支持macOS，且依赖MLX框架，模型生态相对有限。实际部署时需注意硬件内存和模型大小对性能的影响。
articles.highlight: 该应用能自动识别Hugging Face缓存目录中已有的MLX模型，使用体验非常顺滑。
articles.sourceExcerpt: Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac Prince Canuma is the developer behind the excellent MLX-VLM Python library for running vision-LLMs using MLX on a Mac. I'm really excited about his new project, which wraps MLX in a full macOS desktop application. It's similar in shape to LM Studio, providing both a chat interface and a localhost API server for accessing models.

zh.title: Nativ: 在Mac上本地运行AI模型的桌面应用
zh.highlight: 该应用能自动识别Hugging Face缓存目录中已有的MLX模型，使用体验非常顺滑。
zh.summary: 文章介绍了Nativ这款macOS桌面应用，它封装了MLX库，提供类似LM Studio的聊天界面和本地API服务器。特别之处在于能自动加载用户Hugging Face缓存中的模型，省去重复下载的麻烦。对于Mac用户来说，这是一个方便、低门槛的本地AI模型运行工具。
zh.failureAnalysis: 目前仅支持macOS，且依赖MLX框架，模型生态相对有限。实际部署时需注意硬件内存和模型大小对性能的影响。

en.highlight: The app automatically picks up MLX models already present in your Hugging Face cache directory, which is a nice touch.
en.summary: The article introduces Nativ, a macOS desktop app that wraps MLX to provide a chat interface and local API server for running LLMs. It seamlessly integrates with your Hugging Face cache, avoiding redundant downloads. For Mac users, it offers an easy and accessible way to run local AI models.
en.failureAnalysis: Currently macOS-only and relies on the MLX framework, which has a smaller model ecosystem. Users need to consider hardware memory and model size for practical performance.
en.title: Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac

articles.title: AgnesAI-Labs/AgnesAI-Models
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 该项目是Agnes AI的官方模型网关和目录，支持OpenAI兼容的API接口，覆盖文本、图像、视频和智能体工作流。其价值在于为开发者提供统一、易用的多模态模型接入方案，降低集成成本。值得关注是因为它代表了开源AI工具向生产级服务演进的方向。
articles.failureAnalysis: 项目高度依赖OpenAI生态兼容性，若OpenAI调整API或出现更优替代方案，其优势将迅速减弱。目前仅有1358星，社区活跃度有限，且多模态与智能体工作流工程复杂度高，可能面临维护和迭代瓶颈。此外，作为网关项目，其商业模式和长期可持续性未明确，易被大平台功能替代。
articles.highlight: 提供OpenAI兼容的文本、图像、视频与智能体工作流模型网关
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1358 stars and recent public activity. Description: Official Agnes AI gateway and model catalog for OpenAI-compatible text, image, video, and agent workflows.

en.highlight: An OpenAI-compatible gateway for text, image, video, and agent workflows.
en.summary: This repository serves as the official gateway and model catalog for Agnes AI, providing OpenAI-compatible APIs for text, image, video, and agent workflows. It is worth reading because it showcases a practical approach to unifying multimodal AI model access, simplifying integration for developers.
en.failureAnalysis: The project's tight coupling with OpenAI compatibility makes it vulnerable to API changes or competition. With only 1358 stars, limited community traction, and high engineering complexity in multimodal agents, it may struggle with maintenance and adoption.
en.title: AgnesAI Models Gateway & Catalog

articles.title: Differentiable Logic Gate Networks for Low-Latency EEG Classification on Edge Devices
articles.selectionReason: Open full-text paper; topic brain_computer_interface; quality signal passed; application scenario is clear.

paperCard.problem: 实时脑电图分类在边缘设备上受限于传统神经网络的浮点运算，导致延迟高、能耗大，无法满足便携式脑机接口的需求。
paperCard.method: 使用可微分逻辑门网络（Diff-Logic），通过将连续特征量化为二进制输入，训练可微分的软逻辑门，收敛后硬化为纯布尔电路，推理时仅需位运算。
paperCard.difference: 传统方法依赖浮点乘加运算（MAC），而Diff-Logic将模型编译为逻辑门电路，完全消除浮点运算，推理速度与模型规模几乎无关。
paperCard.innovation: 首次将可微分逻辑门网络应用于脑电图信号处理，并设计了从软概率训练到编译后布尔推理的完整流程，在边缘CPU上实现恒定低延迟。
paperCard.implementation: 首先对连续脑电特征进行Thermometer编码（用15位二进制表示每个特征值），然后堆叠多层可微分逻辑门，每个门学习16种布尔函数（如AND、OR）的概率分布，训练后选择概率最高的函数固定，最后用Group Sum和Softmax输出类别。
paperCard.applications: 适用于需要实时、低功耗的便携式脑机接口设备，如痴呆症早期筛查、情绪识别、以及任何对延迟和功耗敏感的嵌入式AI场景。
technicalTerms: Diff-Logic: 可微分逻辑门网络，一种可通过梯度下降训练的逻辑电路。
Thermometer编码: 用连续1的个数表示数值大小的二进制编码，保留数据顺序关系。
布尔电路: 由与、或、非等基本逻辑门组成的数字电路，运算速度极快。
位运算: 直接对二进制位进行的操作，如AND、OR等，比浮点运算快得多。
边缘设备: 指靠近数据源进行计算的设备，如手机、嵌入式系统，通常资源有限。

articles.highlight: Diff-Logic推理时间在模型规模扩大10倍时几乎保持不变，最大复杂度层级下相比MLP实现2.9倍加速。
articles.summary: 该论文提出可微分逻辑门网络（Diff-Logic），将神经网络编译为纯布尔电路，通过位运算在CPU上高效执行。在痴呆检测和情绪识别两个脑电任务上，Diff-Logic以极低延迟和更小模型体积取得了与MLP相当甚至更优的性能，适合资源受限的边缘设备部署。
articles.failureAnalysis: 在情绪识别任务中，MLP仍保持适度优势，且Diff-Logic需要Thermometer编码将连续特征转换为二进制输入，数据集规模较大时输入维度膨胀明显。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The 39th Canadian Conference on Artificial Intelligence DOI: 0 Differentiable Logic Gate Networks for Low-Latency EEG Classification on Edge Devices Shyamal Y. Valderrama†,⋄, §* † The University of Winnipeg, Department of Applied Computer Science ‡ The University of Winnipeg, Department of Psychology ⋄ University of Manitoba, Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering § University of Calgary, Department of Community Health Sciences *c.valderrama.uwinnipeg.ca Abstract Real-time EEG classification on edge devices is bottlenecked by the floating-point arithmetic of conventional neural networks. We investigated Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (Diff-Logic) as a hardware-native alternative that compiles models into pure Boolean circuits executable via bitwise CPU operations.

zh.title: 可微分逻辑门网络：面向边缘设备的低延迟脑电图分类
zh.highlight: Diff-Logic推理时间在模型规模扩大10倍时几乎保持不变，最大复杂度层级下相比MLP实现2.9倍加速。
zh.summary: 该论文提出可微分逻辑门网络（Diff-Logic），将神经网络编译为纯布尔电路，通过位运算在CPU上高效执行。在痴呆检测和情绪识别两个脑电任务上，Diff-Logic以极低延迟和更小模型体积取得了与MLP相当甚至更优的性能，适合资源受限的边缘设备部署。
zh.failureAnalysis: 在情绪识别任务中，MLP仍保持适度优势，且Diff-Logic需要Thermometer编码将连续特征转换为二进制输入，数据集规模较大时输入维度膨胀明显。

paperCard.problem: 实时脑电图分类在边缘设备上受限于传统神经网络的浮点运算，导致延迟高、能耗大，无法满足便携式脑机接口的需求。
paperCard.method: 使用可微分逻辑门网络（Diff-Logic），通过将连续特征量化为二进制输入，训练可微分的软逻辑门，收敛后硬化为纯布尔电路，推理时仅需位运算。
paperCard.difference: 传统方法依赖浮点乘加运算（MAC），而Diff-Logic将模型编译为逻辑门电路，完全消除浮点运算，推理速度与模型规模几乎无关。
paperCard.innovation: 首次将可微分逻辑门网络应用于脑电图信号处理，并设计了从软概率训练到编译后布尔推理的完整流程，在边缘CPU上实现恒定低延迟。
paperCard.implementation: 首先对连续脑电特征进行Thermometer编码（用15位二进制表示每个特征值），然后堆叠多层可微分逻辑门，每个门学习16种布尔函数（如AND、OR）的概率分布，训练后选择概率最高的函数固定，最后用Group Sum和Softmax输出类别。
paperCard.applications: 适用于需要实时、低功耗的便携式脑机接口设备，如痴呆症早期筛查、情绪识别、以及任何对延迟和功耗敏感的嵌入式AI场景。
technicalTerms: Diff-Logic: 可微分逻辑门网络，一种可通过梯度下降训练的逻辑电路。
Thermometer编码: 用连续1的个数表示数值大小的二进制编码，保留数据顺序关系。
布尔电路: 由与、或、非等基本逻辑门组成的数字电路，运算速度极快。
位运算: 直接对二进制位进行的操作，如AND、OR等，比浮点运算快得多。
边缘设备: 指靠近数据源进行计算的设备，如手机、嵌入式系统，通常资源有限。

en.highlight: Diff-Logic inference time remained nearly constant across a 10× increase in model scale, achieving a peak speedup of 2.9× over MLPs at the largest complexity tier.
en.summary: This paper proposes Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (Diff-Logic), compiling neural networks into pure Boolean circuits executed via bitwise CPU operations. On dementia detection and emotion recognition tasks, Diff-Logic achieves competitive or superior performance with significantly lower latency and smaller model size, suitable for resource-constrained edge deployment.
en.failureAnalysis: On emotion recognition, MLP still retains a moderate advantage, and Diff-Logic requires thermometer encoding that inflates input dimensions for large datasets.
en.title: Differentiable Logic Gate Networks for Low-Latency EEG Classification on Edge Devices

paperCard.problem: Real-time EEG classification on edge devices is bottlenecked by floating-point arithmetic of conventional neural networks, causing high latency and energy consumption.
paperCard.method: Uses Differentiable Logic Gate Networks that quantize continuous features into binary inputs, train differentiable soft logic gates, and harden them into pure Boolean circuits for inference with only bitwise operations.
paperCard.difference: Previous methods rely on multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations; Diff-Logic compiles models into logic gates, eliminating floating-point arithmetic and achieving nearly constant inference speed regardless of model scale.
paperCard.innovation: First application of differentiable logic gate networks to EEG signals, with a pipeline from soft probabilistic training to compiled Boolean inference, enabling constant low latency on edge CPUs.
paperCard.implementation: First, continuous EEG features are quantized via thermometer encoding (15-bit per feature). Then, multiple layers of differentiable logic gates are stacked, each learning a probability distribution over 16 Boolean functions (e.g., AND, OR). After training, the most probable function is fixed per gate. Finally, a Group Sum and Softmax produce class probabilities.
paperCard.applications: Suitable for real-time, low-power brain-computer interfaces, such as early dementia screening, emotion recognition, and any embedded AI scenario with strict latency and energy constraints.
technicalTerms: Diff-Logic: Differentiable Logic Gate Networks, trainable logic circuits via gradient descent.
Thermometer encoding: Binary encoding representing magnitude by count of leading 1s, preserving ordinality.
Boolean circuit: Digital circuit composed of basic logic gates (AND, OR, NOT), extremely fast.
Bitwise operation: Operation directly on binary bits (e.g., AND, OR), much faster than floating-point.
Edge device: Device performing computation near data source (e.g., phone, embedded system), typically resource-limited.

articles.title: juanjuandog/FinSight-AI
articles.selectionReason: AI source passed freshness and evidence-chain gate: GitHub + Community signal
articles.summary: 这是一个开源的AI股权研究代理项目，集成了弹性工作流、Redis Lua单次飞行、pgvector RAG等先进技术，提供版本化报告和证据追踪功能。该项目在GitHub上获得1029颗星，展现出社区关注度，值得研究其工程实现和实际应用潜力。
articles.failureAnalysis: 该项目依赖高质量金融数据和合规性，但公开数据源有限且监管严格，可能难以规模化。此外，RAG系统对检索准确性要求高，证据追踪增加复杂度，工程成本较高。若无法解决数据获取和合规问题，可能停留在实验阶段。
articles.highlight: 具有弹性工作流、Redis Lua单次飞行、pgvector RAG、版本化报告和证据追踪的AI股权研究代理
articles.sourceExcerpt: GitHub repository with 1029 stars and recent public activity. Description: AI equity research agent with resilient workflows, Redis Lua single-flight, pgvector RAG, versioned reports, evidence tracing, and RAG evaluation.

zh.failureAnalysis: 该项目依赖高质量金融数据和合规性，但公开数据源有限且监管严格，可能难以规模化。此外，RAG系统对检索准确性要求高，证据追踪增加复杂度，工程成本较高。若无法解决数据获取和合规问题，可能停留在实验阶段。

en.highlight: AI equity research agent with resilient workflows, Redis Lua single-flight, pgvector RAG, versioned reports, and evidence tracing.
en.summary: This is an open-source AI equity research agent project that integrates resilient workflows, Redis Lua single-flight, pgvector RAG, and other advanced technologies, offering versioned reports and evidence tracing. With 1029 stars on GitHub, it shows community interest and is worth exploring for its engineering and application potential.
en.failureAnalysis: The project depends on high-quality financial data and compliance, but public data sources are limited and regulations are strict, hindering scalability. RAG accuracy and evidence tracing add complexity and cost, possibly limiting it to experimental use.
